title: Urgent Opening Teacher at Narayana Group Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Teacher at Narayana Group Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Narayana Group Advisory Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Noida-based team.

About Narayana Group Advisory Limited:
Narayana Group Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Group Advisory Limited!
